subcodes.first_line: O thou assured believer! Among the names of God revealed in the Qur'án is "the Faithful," as He hath declared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن موقن از جمله اسماء الهی در قرآن مومن است چنانچه فرموده است یعنی در
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
